Sweeten your Thanksgiving meal with delicious pies from Splurge
Bakery in Millburn. Get your 8" homemade pies in time for the
holiday!

HOT COCOA BOMB - $7
GINGERBREAD HOUSE KIT (includes 5" pre-built gingerbread house) - $35ORDER  BY MONDAY, NOVEMBER 17TH
PICK-UP AT SCHOOL ON TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 25TH

Please JOIN St. Cloud on Friday, Nov. 14th at 9:30am
on Stagg Field. 
The entire school will march to acknowledge and
celebrate Ruby Bridges. Students are ENCOURAGED
to WEAR PURPLE as they walk with their class and
hold signs that are made while learning about Civil
Rights Icon Ruby Bridges. Wear your purple too! 
FRIDAY, NOV 14
9:30am @ Stagg Field

FOOD
DRIVEFOOD
DRIVEST. CLOUD ELEMENTARY SCHOOL PTA
NOVNOVEMBER EMBER 17-21
17-21
We’re collecting shelf-stable food goods to
donate to Foodbank. Send your donations to
school with your child or bring them with you for
your Parent-Teacher conference. 
THE GRADE 
THAT COLLECTS THE 
MOST 
DONATIONS 
WILL WIN 
A PRIZE!

GALLOP
Even though our latest cycle at Luna Stage just wrapped, I’m excited to share that I’m
now offering private acting lessons — both in-person and virtual — for kids and adults!
These sessions are all about building confidence, creativity, and readiness — not just
for the stage, but for life.
Here’s what we’ll cover:
Building Confidence & Stage Presence
Text Analysis
Character Development
Physicality to Create Dynamic Performances
Voice Work
Viewpoints Principles
Chekhov Technique
Meisner Exercises
Stretching the Imagination
When I was training, I often left class wondering, “But how do I use this outside the
room?” My goal is to change that. These lessons will help you apply your skills on stage,
on camera, and in everyday life — discovering your unique tools so you’re prepared,
not just practiced.
If you’ve been looking for a safe, creative space to learn, play, and grow, now’s the
moment. Let’s build confidence, creativity, and courage — one class at a time. 
NATASHA
H EY FRIEN DS!
 
M ISS NATASHA HERE
 Regular Pricing & Sign-Up Options
Single Sessions
• Child Single Lesson – $50
Book & Pay (Calendly) - Kids Private Acting Lesson
• Adult Single Lesson – $75
Book & Pay (Calendly) - Adult Private Acting Lesson
4-Class Packs
• Child 4-Class Pack - $175
Pay Here - 4-Class Pack for Kids
• Adult 4-Class Pack - $250
Pay Here - 4-Class Pack for Adults
8-Class Packs
• Child 8-Class Pack – $320
Pay Here - 8-Class Pack for Kids
• Adult 8-Class Pack – $480
Pay Here - 8-Class Pack for Adults
Nov 8–10 Only!
• Adult 8-Session Package – $320
(CLICK TO PURCHASE: Adult 8-Session Package)
• Child 8-Session Package – $240
(CLICK TO PURCHASE: Kids 8-Session Package)

NOVEMBER REMINDERS
Grade Level Food Drive
Monday, November 17-21, 2025
 (send with student or bring to parent teacher conference)
Ruby Bridges Day- Join us for the walk
November 14, 2025 at 9:30am
NO School:  November 6, 7, 27, 28
Early Dismissal: November 4, 18, 19,  20, 26
Parent/Teacher Conference: November 18-20
PTA Meeting 
Join us and let your voice be heard  
November 12th 8pm on Zoom
Parent Volunteer Signup for Bookfair 
Be on the lookout to volunteer at the bookfair during your child's class.  E-Wallet
opens so that you can add money to your child's  account. 
   November 10th

E
L
E
M
ENTARY SCHOOL
ST. CLOUD t o d a y
JOIN THE PTA for the 2025-26 school year and
make this a fantastic year for the Jaguars!G e t  y o u r  2 0 2 5 - 2 6
SCAN THE QR CODE TO LEARN MORE AND
JOIN THE PTA TODAY! PLEASE FEEL FREE
TO EMAIL MEMBERSHIP@STCLOUDPTA.ORG
WITH YOUR QUESTIONS.
PTA M EM BERSHIP
Volunteer 
OpportunitiesCultural Enrichment 
ProgramsYour $15 supports... 
Community EventsSchool AssembliesTeacher Appreciation
School Improvements
And you can be as involved
or uninvolved as you want!
bit.ly/scpta2526
